name: A & L Auto Recyclers
message: [AI generated] A & L Auto Recyclers is an auto recycling and parts company located in Lakeshore, Ontario, Canada. This eco-friendly organization specializes in the purchase and resale of used auto parts. Their salvage yard holds a wide array of vehicles of various makes and models, offering consumers cost-effective options for parts. They also provide services for unwanted vehicles, acquiring them for parts or scrap and ensuring environmentally safe disposal.
